title: calendar select payload doesn't contain the date that was clicked
description: When a user clicks a day in the calendar, the select event fires with { year, month, day } as separate numbers. Consumers must reconstruct the date manually. The payload should include a 'date' field with the ISO date string (e.g. '2026-06-18') so consumers can use it directly without reconstruction.
resolution: Added 'date' field (ISO string YYYY-MM-DD) to calendar select payload. Updated contract (contracts-payload.ts) and builder (calendar.ts fireSelect). All 3 event proves pass.
